reasoning: This sequence aims to mimic a bear's hug, emphasizing the encompassing nature of the gesture.  The robot will extend both arms outward in a welcoming motion, then bring them inward as if embracing something.  The movements will be relatively slow and deliberate to emphasize the gentle and protective nature of a bear.  I'll use the existing examples as a guide to ensure the robot's movements remain within its physical constraints. Frame 1 will begin with both arms at the sides, neutral position. Then, in frame 2, the arms will extend outward, mimicking a bear spreading its arms. Frame 3 will show the arms starting to come together. Finally, frame 4 will show the arms in a hug-like position. This creates a sequence that is both emotionally expressive and mechanically feasible for the robot.
